meta.title: doctore.ar - Digital Healthcare Solutions
meta.description: We transform medical management with natural and intuitive technology

hero.title: Technology that flourishes with your clinic
hero.description: Digital solutions that grow organically with your medical practice. Simple, natural, and in harmony with your workflow.

turnos.title: TurnosMedicos
turnos.description: The appointment management system that grows naturally with your clinic. Online scheduling, automatic reminders, and much more.
turnos.feature1_desc: Your patients book whenever they want, from anywhere
turnos.feature2_desc: WhatsApp, SMS and email to reduce no-shows
turnos.feature3_desc: Complete dashboard to optimize your time

services.title: Solutions that grow with you
services.subtitle: Digital tools that naturally adapt to the needs of your medical practice
services.service1_desc: Complete online scheduling system with automatic bookings and smart reminders.
services.service2_desc: Secure, accessible, and organized medical records for better care.
services.service3_desc: Automate your billing and manage payments simply and transparently.
services.service4_desc: Integrated virtual consultations to expand your reach without borders.

pricing.title: Plans that grow with you
pricing.subtitle: No surprises, no commitments. Choose the plan that best fits your practice.

about.title: Strong roots, sustained growth
about.description: We were born with the mission of making medical technology as natural as breathing. We believe the best technology is one that integrates seamlessly into your daily routine.
about.value1_desc: Intuitive interfaces that anyone can use without training.
about.value2_desc: We scale with you, without sudden jumps or hidden costs.
about.value3_desc: Lasting solutions that evolve with the needs of the sector.

contact.info_text: We're here to help you grow your practice. Contact us and discover how we can work together.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your clinic and needs...

footer.tagline: Technology that grows naturally with your medical practice.
